name: Gokuwmon

signature_move.name: Higi: Mugen'ei
signature_move.description: Wields theNyoikinkobouand creates afterimages with its acrobatic movements.

description: Gokuwmon, who was born from within the boiling magma of Boot Volcano , extracted data from numerous databases to serve as models in its pursuit of strength, becoming a Combat Digimon that awakened to the combat instinct it was born with. Although it is journeying across the Digital World to challenge formidable enemies and satiate the craving engraved inside of its heart, if it encounters an opponent that it judges to be strong it will insolently request a battle, regardless of the situation. However, due to the " Kinkoji " which was placed on Gokuwmon's head by Sanzomon when it was born, its head will be constricted and it will pass out if it swears to excess, so it reluctantly observes decorum. Gokuwmon is proficient in a large number of martial and magical arts, and since the " Nyoikinkobou " in its hand is extensible, it can inflict strikes on enemies that are far away, and is also an all-purpose weapon that can fire a lightning cannon while connected, and fire lightning bullets as pistols when split in two. With its " Higi: Mugen'ei ", in which it toys with the enemy with its deft wielding of the " Nyoikinkobou " and its acrobatic movements, it unleashes an attack of afterimages that makes it look like the opponent is under attack by a horde of Gokuwmon. It can thrust the " Nyoikinkobou " into the ground and extend it upwards into a thundercloud in the sky, where it then runs up into the cloud and accumulates the thunder energy within itself, and rams into the opponent like a bolt of thunder ( Shippūjinraigeki ). It can amplify and fire the energy within the " Nyoikinkobou " ( Choutaiden Raikouhou ). Also, with its magical art " Kintoun ", in which it gathers clouds and flies through the sky, it is able to move through the air at high speed.
